programme.desc: Mike and Mandy go to extreme measures to help Vanessa connect with voters in her state assembly campaign; Ed's offer to split a baby gift for Kristin and Ryan leads Chuck and Kyle to wonder which of them makes more money.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: When Mike and Vanessa invite Jen's father to her graduation, Jen struggles with accepting his "plus one" -- his girlfriend Fiona; the Outdoor Man crew debates over which word was said in a viral audio recording that's been tearing the internet apart.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: When none of the kids will confess to putting a hole in the wall, Adam and Andi team up to find the guilty one.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi try to avoid a holiday disaster after a blizzard prevents the family from visiting the grandparents' house for Christmas.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Dana and baby Tanner stay with Jim and Cheryl for a night, but the baby's crying makes it impossible for Jim to sleep.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim does not tell Cheryl that their health insurance has been canceled after he has an argument with a claims representative.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Coach Jim turns his daughters' noncompetitive basketball team into tough, aggressive winners.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: The Ghost of Andy gives Jim a glimpse of Kyle's future as a loser because of Jim's failed attempts to help his son during a softball game.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Brad prepares for his first date with Jennifer; Jill's feminist girlfriend Karen is expected to visit.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) asks for a sentimental birthday gift, so Tim (Tim Allen) shops for lingerie.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim and guest Bob Vila test their knowledge in a competition on "Tool Time.".

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim gets into trouble when he misses a romantic Valentine's Day weekend with Jill to satisfy his sponsor's demands.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike and Vanessa think Mandy and Kyle should move out; Chuck relays some unexpected news about Kyle's absentee mom; Boyd might be embarrassed about being home-schooled.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: At The Outdoor Man store, Mandy unintentionally causes a dispute between Chuck and Joe; thinking Vanessa needs to blow off some steam, Kristen and Eve invite her to their kickboxing class.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike and Vanessa eagerly await Eve's return from the Air Force Academy; Ryan's anxiety about current events leads to a shocking announcement.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: After avoiding expressing emotion after his dad died, Mike finally has the heart-to-heart with Bud that he never had while he was alive; Kristin proposes a new business venture; Mandy gives Kyle a makeover to fit his new corporate job.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: When Jackie (Mila Kunis) discovers that Kelso (Ashton Kutcher) kissed another girl, she bars him from the gang's ski trip. With Topher Grace.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: On Eric and Donna's (Topher Grace, Laura Prepon) first date, the waiter (guest star Dino Meminger) mistakenly serves Donna mixed drinks.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: When Red takes the Vista Cruiser away from Eric, the guys are grounded until Kelso borrows his cousin's car.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: When Jackie (Mila Kunis) has a pregnancy scare, Donna (Laura Prepon) is prompted to start taking birth control pills. With Topher Grace.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam makes a hasty decision after getting upset with his daughter's kindergarten teacher, landing himself and Andi in trouble.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Don persuades Adam to turn his cluttered garage into a man cave; Adam is distraught after thinking he gave away one of Andi's beloved keepsakes.

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: The investigation into the March 2024 container ship collision that resulted in the collapse of the Francis Scott Key Bridge in Baltimore.

programme.title: Nature
programme.sub-title: Raptors: A Fistful of Daggers: Meet the Raptors
programme.desc: The many species of raptors, from giant eagles to miniature falconets, and how they survive bitter winters, learn to hunt and undergo epic migrations.

programme.title: Secrets of the Dead
programme.desc: Archaeological evidence suggests that the legend of King Arthur began in a 5th-century trading village following the departure of the Romans.

programme.title: Washington Week With The Atlantic
programme.desc: Peter Baker, The New York Times; Susan Glasser, The New Yorker; David Ignatius, The Washington Post; Missy Ryan, The Atlantic.

programme.title: Changing Planet
programme.desc: A visit to the Maldives focuses on coral reefs and the urgent efforts to help them survive climate change.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tina Hobley and Sharon Maughan travel around the beautiful Cotswold countryside in search of some classy antiques to sell at auction. Accompanied by experts James Braxton and Raj Bisram, they face off for the bragging rights.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: The "Windstorm in Bubbleland" opera tells how Hildegarde Hummingbird tries to save Bubbleland.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: The Lost Dinosaur; The Princess Problem
programme.desc: Rapty the dinosaur goes missing; D.W. learns the true qualities of a princess with the help of Arthur's friend Lydia.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: While hanging out with golden pheasants in China, Martin and Chris realize how important color is for creatures when Donita Donata steals animals and removes their color.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: Dot and Al announce the Hunters are spending Christmas in Nigeria, and Corky wonders if she can have a fun Christmas without snow.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Lyla Can't Sleep; Hairdos and Hair Don'ts
programme.desc: Lyla struggles to sleep and tries to figure out what is wrong with her sleep routine; Lyla tries to do her own hairstyle.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: Whole Lotta Lotta; Leaf It to Carl
programme.desc: Lotta is determined to show Skyler that she is more than just "headphone girl"; the new kid in school causes a hullabaloo on the playground.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel Can't Ride Trolley; Daniel Can't Get What He Wants
programme.desc: Daniel is mad when he can't ride the trolley; Daniel learns that stomping three times helps him feel better when he is upset.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay learn how to sort items; Phoebe and Jay learn how to make food labels, so everyone can participate in the potluck.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo's bike is great, but Abby's bike might be even better; Tamir teaches Elmo how to deal with feeling jealous and to enjoy the things Elmo already has.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: Sammys Primmo; Sammy Makes a Day
programme.desc: Sammy and Benito find a way to communicate; Sammy makes plans for his mom's visit.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.sub-title: Bright Bright Bugs; Panda's Purple Break
programme.desc: Donkey and Panda camp out to see the Bright Bugs; Panda feels tired of his purple things, so Donkey helps him take a break.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules

programme.title: Daniah Greenberg: TLV Bible Plus
programme.desc: A fascinating look at the Bible translation that highlights the Hebrew roots of the Christian faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, a Christian minister, discusses religious teachings and encourages people to live ethically.

programme.title: Dr. Jeremiah Johnston: Body of Proof
programme.desc: Acclaimed apologist and scholar Dr. Jeremiah Johnston sets out to show why Jesus' victory over death is central to a believer's faith.

programme.title: Gaither Gospel Hour
programme.desc: Bill & Gloria Gaither gathered in Tennessee with over 200 of their Homecoming Friends for a beautiful time of fellowship and celebration in song. The choir of award-winning talents, including the Gaither Vocal Band, The Martins and The Isaacs.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Join Sheila Walsh as she hosts Sarah Jakes Roberts for an empowering conversation about God's power within you.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh hosts Darren Wilson from Los Angeles.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Erick Stakelbeck host Reza Safa.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: A Theological Prophecy - The Falling Away
programme.desc: Strategies for guarding against apostasy.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Receiving the Lord's freedom, favor and victory through right believing.

programme.title: Rick Warren: The Purpose Driven Life
programme.desc: With more than 35 million copies sold, and more than 70 translations available, The Purpose Driven Life is far more than just a book, a it's the road map for spiritual journeys; Rick uncovers how to find purpose in pain.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: The teaching ministry of American Southern Baptist pastor and television host, Robert Jeffress; he is a senior minister of the First Baptist Church in Dallas as well as a Fox News contributor.

programme.title: Michael A. Youssef
programme.desc: Pastor Michael Youssef proclaims God's word to all the people around the world through the ministries of Leading The Way.

programme.title: Time of Grace With Pastor Mike Novotny
programme.desc: Connecting people to God's grace, love, glory and power and showing that the temporary things of life don't satisfy. Showing that what brings satisfaction is knowing that Jesus lived, died, and rose for all, providing access to eternal life with God.

programme.title: Dr. Tony Evans
programme.desc: Dr. Tony Evans discusses practical issues of today.

programme.title: Truths That Transform
programme.desc: Featuring Rob Pacienza, with sermon commentary from D. James Kennedy; an analysis of current moral and cultural controversies, all from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.sub-title: How to Find, Follow & Fulfill God's Will: Episode 5
programme.desc: Andrew says God created each believer with a specific purpose, and He wants each one to find His will for his or her life, follow that path and fulfill it in His strength and timing.

programme.title: All In With Jordan Easley
programme.desc: Pastor Jordan Easley seeks to help believers and unbelievers understand and apply God's word to their lives.

programme.title: Unspeakable Joy with Tyler Gaulden
programme.desc: Featuring the ministry of Tyler Gaulden from Church Street Baptist Church in Greensboro, NC.

programme.title: Higher Aim With Dr. Curt Dodd
programme.desc: Dr. Curt Dodd seeks to globally proclaim the Gospel of Jesus Christ and bring those who are lost into a real life-transforming relationship with the Savior, while also encouraging believers in their daily walk with the Lord.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Rejoice in the Lord
programme.desc: Inspirational music and lessons from Campus Church in Pensacola, Fla.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.sub-title: Why I Believe in the Resurrection
programme.desc: Did Jesus really rise from the dead? Hear factual reasons why we can have confidence in the resurrection.

programme.title: Passion With Louie Giglio
programme.desc: Messages of hope and redemption from Passion City Church in Atlanta, Georgia, with Louie Giglio.

programme.title: Great Life With Mike Kai
programme.desc: Move the needle from average to extraordinary.

programme.title: Ralph West
programme.desc: Encouraging the world through Bible based teaching.

programme.title: Larry and Tiz Huch
programme.desc: Pastors Larry and Tiz Huch teach about the blessings and miracles found in rediscovering the Judo-Christian roots of our faith and the biblical importance of standing with the nation of Israel.

programme.title: A.R. Bernard
programme.desc: Navigating the intersection of faith and culture.

programme.title: Lift Up Jesus with Pastor Dudley
programme.desc: Senior Pastor Dudley Rutherford shares biblical truths and practical knowledge to live the life God intended for everybody, from Shepherd Church in Porter Ranch, Calif.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: Bayless Conley shares why one can't enjoy the peace of eternal life without declaring the truth of who Jesus really is.
